g.text: Agent generates structured scenes on the left; Excalidraw renders with formal graphic style on the right. Users can continue editing and export JSON / SVG / PNG.
Can be fed back to agent
elements + appState + files + styleId; provider is replaceable, but agent only targets stable JSON contracts.
Generator principle: partition complex relationships first, explain cross-region dependencies with buses or tables, avoid long diagonal lines crossing the canvas.
Editing principle: each module is an independent element; connections only link adjacent layers, easy to adjust after user dragging.
Titles, groups, swimlanes, matrices, annotation bars
Unidirectional flow, bidirectional subscription, bus, cross-layer dependencies
Formal / Light whiteboard / High contrast themes
